summary: The BriefLink MVP slice is in final walkthrough closure. The remaining track is narrow: confirm the final assembled demo package so the handoff can be declared closed.

checks.name: user-flow walkthrough complete
checks.summary: The walkthrough baseline is on disk across the current MVP flow, with frontend and backend demo-handoff artifacts landed and backend handoff accepted.

checks.name: product promise / brand alignment complete
checks.summary: Brand walkthrough material is on disk and the company is in closure mode, but explicit final acceptance of the unified product-promise/brand layer is not yet evidenced in the provided board snapshot.

checks.name: demo-ready package assembled
checks.summary: The package is near closure, but final confirmation that the walkthrough, promise/alignment layer, and handoff materials are assembled into one demo-ready package is still pending.

blockers: Final acceptance of the unified product-promise/brand alignment for the walkthrough.
Final confirmation that the assembled package is ready for demo handoff.
closureReadyWhen: Product promise / brand alignment is explicitly accepted.
The assembled walkthrough package is confirmed ready for demo handoff.
